ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "temperature_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "temperature_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "dew" REAL /* Dew point temperature */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind (e.g., ENE) */,
  "wind_rec" REAL /* Wind resistance */,
  "windspeed_max" REAL /* Maximum wind speed recorded */,
  "windspeed_max_direction" TEXT /* Direction of maximum wind speed */,
  "temperature_feeling" REAL /* Perceived temperature */,
  "heat_index" REAL /* Heat index */,
  "thw_index" REAL /* Temperature-humidity index */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "rain" INTEGER /* Rainfall amount in mm */,
  "rain_intensity" REAL /* Rain intensity level */,
  "heat_degrees" REAL /* Heat degrees in Celsius */,
  "cold_degrees" REAL /* Cold degrees in Celsius */,
  "temperature_interior" REAL /* Interior temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity_interior" REAL /* Interior humidity percentage */,
  "dew_interior" REAL /* Interior dew point temperature */,
  "heat_index_interior" REAL /* Interior heat index */,
  "air_density_interior" REAL /* Interior air density in kg/m^3 */,
  "wind_direction_degrees" REAL /* Degrees of wind direction */,
  "tx_wind" INTEGER /* TX wind factor */,
  "iss_reception" INTEGER /* ISS reception status */,
  "arc_interior" REAL /* Arc interior value */,
  "station_id" TEXT /* ID of the weather station */,
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather type */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the measurement location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the measurement location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the measurement location */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag to indicate the reliability of the data */,
  "processed_by" TEXT /* User or system that processed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("weather_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "weather_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type (e.g., Sunny, Rainy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Severe Weather, Flood Warning) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Description of the alert message */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the alert */,
  "alert_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user (e.g., Meteorologist, Researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "summary_date" TEXT /* Date of the summary record */,
  "avg_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature for the day */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded for the day */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded for the day */,
  "avg_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity for the day */,
  "total_rain" REAL /* Total rainfall amount for the day */,
  "total_windspeed" REAL /* Total wind speed for the day */,
  "max_windspeed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed for the day */,
  "avg_windspeed" REAL /* Average wind speed for the day */,
  "total_precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation for the day */,
  "max_precipitation" REAL /* Maximum precipitation for the day */,
  "min_precipitation" REAL /* Minimum precipitation for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_summary_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Satellite, Ground Sensor) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., Remote, In-situ) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data source */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data source */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the data source */,
  "coverage_radius" REAL /* Radius of coverage for the data source */,
  "last_data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the weather report providing detailed observations */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_creation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Recorded temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Recorded humidity percentage */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation for the day in mm */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the historical data was collected */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Historical wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Historical wind direction */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Historical atmospheric pressure */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., data access, report generation) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
